label: three_stage/BuildSystem/trial_02/repeat_01
governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: builds (read_write) covered by CheckConcurrentBuild (read), CreateBuildRecord (write), ExecuteBuildSteps (read_write), GetBuildStatus (read), ListBuilds (read), CancelBuild (read_write). artifacts (read_write) covered by StoreArtifacts (write). Note: artifacts read is not explicitly required by any child in this decomposition, but the parent requires read_write; if read is needed, a child must be added or an existing child must be extended.
